title: CreateFlowRequest
description: CreateFlowRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

flowName.description: The specified name of the flow. Spaces are not allowed. Use underscores or hyphens only.

clientToken.description: Idempotency token to ensure CreateFlow completes only once.

description.example: Transfer Salesforce accounts to S3 daily
description.description: A description of the flow you want to create.

kmsArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key for encryption.

roleArn.description: The ARN of an IAM role that grants AppFlow the permissions it needs to create Data Catalog tables, databases, and partitions.

databaseName.description: The name of an existing Glue Data Catalog database.

tablePrefix.description: A naming prefix for each Data Catalog table that Amazon AppFlow creates.

glueDataCatalog.description: Specifies the configuration that Amazon AppFlow uses when it catalogs data with the Glue Data Catalog.

triggerType.description: Specifies the type of flow trigger. It can be OnDemand, Scheduled, or Event.

triggerProperties.description: Specifies the configuration details of a schedule-triggered flow as defined by the user.

connectorType.description: The type of connector used as a source.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the connector used in the source.

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile. Required for all connectors except Amplitude, Datadog, Dynatrace, GoogleAnalytics, Marketo, SAPOData, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Singular, Slack, Trendmicro, and Veeva.

sourceConnectorProperties.description: Specifies the information that is required to query a particular source connector.

datetimeTypeFieldName.description: A field that specifies the date time or timestamp field as the criteria to use when importing incremental records from the source.

incrementalPullConfig.description: Defines the configuration for a scheduled incremental data pull. If a valid configuration is provided, the fields specified in the configuration are used when querying for the incremental data pull.

destinationFlowConfigList.description: The configuration that controls how Amazon AppFlow places data in the destination connector.

tasks.description: A list of tasks that Amazon AppFlow performs while transferring data in the flow run.

tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for your flow.
